params.name: Gene Map
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Evolution Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Jun 13, 1985, the Human Genome Project was first proposed to study the base pairs of human DNA.

The significance of Gene Map: Discovering the entire sequence of 3 billion base pairs in the human genome, the position of chromosomes, all human genetic information, and understanding humans at the molecular level for the treatment of diseases.
